name: Crisp Red Apples
description: A bag of crisp red apples with a naturally sweet flavor and refreshing crunch. Great for lunchboxes, baking, or a quick snack between meals.

name: Conference Pears
description: Juicy Conference pears with a soft bite and naturally sweet taste. Delicious on their own or sliced into salads, desserts, and breakfast bowls.

name: Sweet Strawberries
description: Bright, sweet strawberries with a juicy texture and fresh aroma. Perfect for breakfast, desserts, smoothies, or eating straight from the punnet.
